text:
- Update to 0.3.43
- Provide additional patch to fix login problems to Wikimedia Commons
  (wpLoginToken is required)

Added file(s):
- files/patch-logintoken
- files/patch-sessionfailure-msg

Renamed file(s):

+ files/patch-Commonist.java
